description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named libBLS Nightly Tests that runs on a schedule and allows manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: main_job on ubuntu-22.04 that checks out the repository, installs dependencies, builds and tests the project with various configurations including valgrind, and another job linux_build_with_emscripten that runs on ubuntu-22.04 with Node.js 18.x, installs dependencies, builds and tests the project with Emscripten.
